info.title: ResxR
info.description: Displays information about .resx files, shows differences between .resx files and performs operations on .resx file

options.name: --missing-keys
options.description:
Finds keys present in the first file which
are missing in the second

options.name: --present-keys
options.description:
Finds keys that are present in both the
first and the second file

options.name: --different-values
options.description:
Finds keys present in both files whos
values differ

options.name: --identical-values
options.description:
Finds keys present in both files with
identical values

options.name: --mismatched-metadata
options.description:
Finds keys present in both files which have
differing metadata (type, mimetype, space
or comment)

options.name: --duplicate-keys
options.description: Finds keys that appear more than once

options.name: --missing-spacepreserve
options.description:
Finds keys that are missing the
xml:space="preserve" attribute

options.name: --copy-missing-keys
options.description:
Copies missing keys from the first file to
the second

options.name: --copy-different-values
options.description:
Copies differing values from the first file
to the second

options.name: --add-missing-spacepreserve
options.description:
Adds xml:space="preserve" attributes to
keys that don't have it

options.name: --full-data
options.description: Shows all fields from the data elements
